title: Tasty Garlicky Mexican Beans Frijoles Charros
description: A garlicky and flaky Mexican dish featuring cream of tartar and bonito shave, perfect for a brunch mood. This gluten-free friendly recipe is a twist on traditional frijoles charros.
instructions: Rinse the soaked pinto beans and transfer them to a large pot with enough water to cover them.
Bring the water to a boil, then reduce the heat to a simmer and cook the beans for 1 hour, or until they are tender.
In a large skillet, heat some oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the cream of tartar, bonito flakes, tomato paste, cumin, and salt.
Add the cooked pinto beans to the skillet and stir to combine with the garlic and spice mixture.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the frijoles charros for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve the frijoles charros hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro or scallions if desired.
